Rows: CAST(COUNT( CASE WHEN T1.element = 'cl' THEN T1.element ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.element)

gt_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT( CASE WHEN T1.element = 'cl' THEN T1.element ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.element) FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.label = '+'
pred_sql:
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = '+'
question: What is the percentage of element chlorine in carcinogenic molecules?
